name_en: P。【Exclusive Background】🔥Top-tier Original 👏Black 32cm. New LouLou_Leather model, soft touch, comes with removable card holder and mini mirror, with sliding chain, can be worn on shoulder or crossbody, meeting multi-occasion needs! The new leather is coated for extra durability and a glossy finish, making the bag look exquisite and beautiful!
